V-M-073.scope: Premium public site and auth verification for landing, login, registration, verification, reset, tariffs, and email-proof semantics.

success-scenarios.scenario-1: Public route communicates VPN, MTProto, tariffs, and signup CTA without a bulky marketing layout.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: Auth routes stay compact and usable on phone/tablet/desktop.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: Registration still delays access until verified email proof.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Public/auth effects obscure forms or imply immediate access before verification.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Canonical tariff data drifts from M-068 backend-owned catalog.
